Documentation.short_help: Split dataset into tet volume, then node sets, then side sets.
Documentation.long_help: Tetrahedra (if any) are extracted first under vtkDataAssembly IOSS/element_blocks/tetrahedra with contiguous GlobalIds (1..N) for IOSS writers. PartitionedDataSetCollection block order is then all node{i} blocks (node_sets), then all side{i} blocks (side_sets). Surface for sets comes from vtkDataSetSurfaceFilter on the tet-only submesh when tets exist (with element_side for Exodus side sets), else polydata or full-dataset surface. Side patches are grouped by a cell-data partition array (Partition Cell Array Name, default EndpointIndex from vtkCGALVesselEndClipper: one scalar per cell, first component rounded to an integer bucket; ascending key order). If that array is missing or the wrong length, or the name is cleared, the surface is split with vtkPolyDataNormals (Feature Angle) and vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter instead. By default Sort By Area reorders those patches so matching node{i}/side{i} pairs follow descending total patch area; turn it off to keep ascending partition-id order from the cell array, or VTK region order from connectivity. Block metadata sets NAME and vtkIOSSReader ENTITY_ID: one ascending id per block in output order (tet block if present, then each node set, then each side set), so ids do not repeat across those groups.

StringVectorProperty.name: PartitionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Partition Cell Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Cell-data array used to group boundary surface cells into side sets (first tuple component; values are rounded to the nearest integer). Default EndpointIndex matches vtkCGALVesselEndClipper output (1-based endpoint id per cap triangle, -1 elsewhere). Clear this string to use only Feature angle / vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter splitting.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature angle (deg)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Used when Partition Cell Array Name is empty, or the named array is missing / wrong length, or cell-array splitting yields no patches: vtkPolyDataNormals dihedral threshold for cusp / sharp edge split, then vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter regions. Larger values merge more smooth neighborhoods.

IntVectorProperty.name: SortByArea
IntVectorProperty.label: Sort By Area
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled (default), reorder node{i} and side{i} patches by total surface area of each side patch, largest first. When disabled, patch order follows ascending partition id from the cell array, or vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter region indices when the feature-angle path is used.

IntVectorProperty.name: CustomPostReorder
IntVectorProperty.label: Custom Post Reorder
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled (default), after the current patch order is fixed (e.g. by Sort By Area), move the third patch to the first position and the first patch to the last position. The second patch follows the new first, then the original fourth through (n-1) in order. No effect if there are fewer than three patches.
